blocked_boundaries: Cross-language materialize of any @boundary whose signature uses this primitive.
metadata.mint_path: Mint typescript:Int sort as 53-bit-safe + sort-morphism:typescript:number:to:concept:Int with precision_loss=none, range_loss=2^53-bounded. For full concept:Int coverage, mint a separate typescript:bigint:to:concept:Int morphism with direction=left-to-right.
metadata.note: TypeScript number is IEEE 754 64-bit float — integer range bounded by 2^53-1 (Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER). For unbounded Int, must use bigint (separate primitive).
